data.description: FDA APPROVES CAPLYTA® (LUMATEPERONE) SNDA WITH ROBUST NEW DATA SUPPORTING REDUCED RISK OF RELAPSE IN SCHIZOPHRENIA

data.title: USA TODAY Again Names Zurn Elkay Water Solutions One of America’s Climate Leaders 2026
data.description: Based in Milwaukee, Zurn Elkay Water Solutions Corporation (NYSE: ZWS) has been recognized as one of America’s Climate Leaders 2026 for the second year in a row by USA Today and Statista. The designation celebrates U.S. companies that made the most significant reductions in their greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions intensity between 2022 and 2024, based on GHG emissions relative to revenue. Statista's analysis shows that Zurn Elkay achieved an impressive 21.3% decrease in greenhouse gas intensity.

Iran reports: 'The Minister of Education announced the martyrdom of 346 cultural figures and students, damage to more than 1,200 educational spaces, and the complete destruction of 20 educational units. He said: 775 damaged schools have been rebuilt and returned to the education cycle so far.'

data.title: AbbVie Submits Regulatory Application to FDA for SKYRIZI® (risankizumab-rzaa) Subcutaneous Induction for Adults with Moderately to Severely Active Crohn's Disease
data.description: New data from the Phase 3 pivotal AFFIRM study backs submission for approval of an additional treatment option for adult Crohn's disease patients. The treatment involves the use of risankizumab-rzaa for intravenous (IV) induction, which is already approved for this purpose. If officially approved, this option will provide these patients with an alternative method for treatment. The submission was made in North Chicago, Illinois on April 27, 2026.
Egypt presidency: 'President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi receives the Deputy Chairman of the Russian Federation and Chairman of the Russian Maritime Board'

data.title: Business First Bancshares, Inc., Announces Financial Results for Q1 2026
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana on April 27, 2026, Business First Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: BFST) disclosed its unaudited financial results for the quarter that concluded on March 31, 2026. The parent company of b1BANK reported a net income available to common shareholders of $22.2 million, equivalent to $0.68 per diluted common share. This marked an increase of $1.2 million in net income and a decrease of $0.03 per share in comparison to the previous quarter. Excluding certain income and expenses, the core net income for the same period was $24.0 million, translating to $0.73 per diluted common share. This represented an increase of $0.5 million in core net income and a decrease of $0.06 per share from the linked quarter. The financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, encompassed the finalization of the Progressive Bancorp, Inc. acquisition.

data.title: Senior Helpers New Kensington/AK Valley and Greensburg Achieve Prestigious CHAP Age-Friendly Care at Home Certification
data.description: In New Kensington, Pennsylvania on April 27, 2026, Senior Helpers, a leading in-home senior care services provider in the country, has achieved a significant milestone by becoming the first private duty in-home care provider in the United States to receive Age-Friendly Care at Home certification from the Community Health Accreditation Partners (CHAP). This recognition highlights their commitment to providing high-quality care tailored to meet the specific needs of senior citizens.

data.title: FDA grants Priority Review for IMAAVY® (nipocalimab-aahu) as the potential first approved treatment for people living with warm autoimmune hemolytic anemia (wAIHA)
data.description: Medications that show potential for substantial advancements in safety or effectiveness for critical illnesses like warm autoimmune hemolytic anemia, a condition where harmful immunoglobulin G autoantibodies bind to and eliminate red blood cells, are given Priority Review. This condition is life-threatening and affects a significant number of individuals globally.

data.title: TransCode Therapeutics Appoints Dr. Anna Moore as Chair of Scientific Advisory Board; Announces Sponsored Research Agreement with Michigan State University
data.description: The clinical-stage company TransCode Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RNAZ) based in Boston revealed the appointment of Anna Moore, PhD, as the Chair of its Scientific board on April 27, 2026. Specializing in RNA and immuno-oncology therapeutics for treating high-risk and advanced cancers, the company focuses on advancing innovative treatment options.

data.title: Hitmarker Launches “Hitmarker Pro,” a New End-to-End Hiring Platform Built specifically for the Gaming Industry
data.description: In Newcastle, England, Hitmarker, a renowned careers platform in the gaming industry, introduced Hitmarker Pro, marking a significant transformation from a job board to a comprehensive hiring solution. This subscription-based service is tailored to assist recruiting teams in accessing the vast gaming talent pool, enhancing their reputation as employers, and overseeing the entire hiring journey - encompassing applications to job offers. This development signifies a strategic move by Hitmarker to provide a holistic recruitment service for the gaming sector.

data.title: Subway® Canada Turns Up the Heat with New ‘Wannabe Spicy’ Menu and Ghost Pepper Bread
data.description: In Toronto, Subway® Canada is spicing things up with their new menu featuring varying levels of heat, starting today. Customers can now choose from three options - ‘Mild,’ ‘Wild,’ and ‘Wicked,’ all served on the new Ghost Pepper Bread. These offerings cater to flavor enthusiasts rather than those seeking extreme heat. Each sandwich combines bold spices with familiar Subway ingredients. This new menu is available across the country, offering Canadians a chance to customize their dining experience based on their spice tolerance.

data.title: Oshkosh Defense Shows Expeditionary Power and Modernized Mobility at Modern Day Marine 2026
data.description: Oshkosh Defense LLC, a business of Oshkosh Corporation [NYSE: OSK], is set to participate in Modern Day Marine from April 28 to 30, 2026. During the event, they will present advanced mobility and sustainment solutions designed to aid Marines in various maritime settings. One of the highlights will be the Remotely Operated Ground Unit for Expeditionary Fires (ROGUE-Fires), which features the Navy/Marine Expeditionary Ship Interdiction System (NMESIS). The ROGUE-Fires offers a land-based fires capacity for expeditions.

data.title: IonQ and Florida LambdaRail Launch First Statewide Quantum-Safe Network Initiative in United States
data.description: In Miami, IonQ (NYSE: IONQ), a prominent quantum platform company, has partnered with Florida LambdaRail (FLR), the statewide research and education fiber optic network in Florida. Their collaboration aims to establish a quantum-safe network across the state. Working alongside Florida Quantum and nearby educational institutions, their initial project involves building an approximately 100-mile quantum corridor linking Palm Beach County to Miami-Dade, and connecting three significant points.

data.title: Christopher Griffith Joins NEXA Lending to Expand Industry Impact and Elevate Service for Veteran Borrowers
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Mesa, Arizona, NEXA Lending revealed that Christopher Griffith has become a part of the team, marking a significant moment for the largest mortgage broker in United States history. With a strong dedication to revolutionizing veteran support within the mortgage sector, Griffith's inclusion is poised to make a profound impact on the industry landscape.

data.title: Reallusion Redefines Digital Double Creation with the Launch of Headshot 3 for Character Creator 5
data.description: Headquartered in San Jose, California, on April 27, 2026, Reallusion, a top company in 3D character creation software, introduced Headshot 3 for Character Creator 5 (CC5). This new release is aimed to enhance the process of generating high-quality digital doubles efficiently. The software offers a streamlined solution to create professional-grade digital doubles and bridges the gap between users and advanced character creation tools.

data.title: New Children's Book Turns Laundry Day into a Laugh-out-Loud Adventure
data.description: Amy Dost, an author, infuses creativity and humor into mundane tasks like laundry, turning them into enjoyable experiences. Based in Seattle, she utilizes her expertise in Early Childhood Education and Linguistics to showcase how simple activities can be transformed into fun adventures. Amy's approach demonstrates that tasks like laundry can be entertaining and engaging for both children and adults.
